scope.summary: StrategicOperation now stores enemyCompositionIntel with per-enemy threat ranges, and recon auto-resolve updates the same enemy intel alongside spoils intel.
scope.mobileQa: skipped: mobile is no longer a current target

browserQa.tooling: Playwright desktop check after in-app browser runtime timed out during localStorage inspection
flow: inspect main battle enemy intel ranges
inspect revised main battle and side-operation enemy intel

observed.initialMainBrief: 敵編成 群集+銃兵+突破体 / 敵情信頼中 / 群集2-4 / 銃兵2-4 / 突破体1-3
observed.deploymentBrief: 敵編成 群集+銃兵+突破体 / 敵情信頼中 / 群集2-4 / 銃兵2-4 / 突破体1-3

implemented: Added EnemyCompositionIntel summary, confidence, threats, threatRanges, reconQualityScore, reconEffect, and revision metadata.
Strategic turn generation creates enemyCompositionIntel for main battles and side operations.
Recon auto-resolve improves or marks enemyCompositionIntel as misleading together with spoils intel.
Save version moved to v6 and migration backfills enemyCompositionIntel for existing operations.
Theater, Deployment, and Army command recommendations now read persisted enemyCompositionIntel first.
deferred: Strategic operation enemy-intel UI affordances beyond text ranges.
